lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The engine and transmission are functional but show signs of age. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior exhibits moderate wear and tear on the upholstery and surfaces.

This vehicle is in pristine, mint condition, appearing as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, retaining a deep factory shine with no stone chips, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, with leather that remains supple and all electronics functioning perfectly. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage. Buyers can expect a car that looks and drives exactly like a new vehicle.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for daily commuting. While the engine and transmission function as expected, the car shows noticeable signs of its age and mileage. The exterior has several visible scratches and a minor dent on the rear passenger door, and the paint has faded slightly on the roof. Inside, the upholstery shows some wear and a few small stains, though all electronics and the air conditioning remain fully operational. It is a solid choice for someone prioritizing utility over aesthetics.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and restoration experts! This vehicle offers a fantastic opportunity for anyone looking for a budget-friendly project. While it is currently in poor condition and will need some significant mechanical and cosmetic work to get it back to its best, it's a wonderful chance to build your dream car from the ground up at a very accessible price point!
This vehicle is in fair condition. It is currently operational but shows noticeable wear on the interior and exterior. Some minor mechanical repairs may be necessary in the near future.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in an uncompromising state of excellence. This specimen showcases a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Meticulously maintained and mechanically beyond reproach, this automobile represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Its condition is absolute, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its inaugural delivery.

Hey there! I’m absolutely in love with this car, but it’s time for it to find a new home. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape—it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this beauty from day one, so you’re getting something truly special. It drives like an absolute dream and I'm sure you're going to love it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

This is an exceptional example of a high-revving, naturally aspirated masterpiece, maintained to a concourse standard. The heart of this machine is a balanced S54 inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned VANOS variable valve timing system that pulls relentlessly to redline. Power is routed through a tactile six-speed close-ratio manual transmission to a mechanical limited-slip differential, providing superlative traction and feedback. The chassis has been fastidiously preserved, featuring a reinforced subframe, fresh bushings, and a sophisticated multi-link rear suspension that ensures surgical turn-in. Every mechanical component, from the cross-drilled rotors to the forged internal reciprocating assembly, remains in peak operating condition. The exterior retains its factory-correct depth and luster, free of oxidation or cosmetic imperfections, while the interior remains a pristine, driver-centric cockpit. This is a collector-grade specimen for the discerning enthusiast who demands mechanical purity.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service records included.

Presenting an absolute showroom-standard specimen that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This vehicle has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in a factory-fresh appearance inside and out. The exterior paint retains its original deep luster, free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, and has been treated with a multi-stage ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the leather remains supple with no bolster wear, and every electronic component functions with Swiss-watch precision. Mechanically, it is flawless, supported by a comprehensive, open-checkbook service history from authorized specialists. With exceptionally low mileage and a documented single-owner provenance, this is a rare opportunity to own what is arguably the finest example of this model currently in existence. Complete with all original keys, window sticker, and service records.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no signs of wear and reflecting a history of meticulous preservation. An uncompromising choice for the discerning collector, it offers a level of mechanical and aesthetic integrity that is increasingly rare in the pre-owned market. Experience the pinnacle of prestige in a vehicle that presents as new.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, preserved in impeccable, showroom-grade condition. This automobile has been curated for the most discerning professional, featuring a flawless exterior profile and an interior that remains indistinguishable from its original manufacture. Meticulously maintained and mechanically absolute, this unit offers a rare synthesis of prestige and performance for the serious investor.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely flawless, showroom condition—it’s been totally babied and looks like it just rolled off the lot! If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨
Presenting an investment-grade E46 M3, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual
Mint condition. Garage kept. No scratches. Full service history. Clean title.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule' find, preserved in showroom-ready condition. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no paint chips, swirls, or imperfections, having been protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating since new. Every body panel is original with factory-perfect gaps. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine, untouched state; the premium leather seats show no signs of creasing or bolster wear, and the original factory scent remains. Mechanically, the car is flawless, having been meticulously maintained at authorized service centers

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects zero signs of wear. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a showroom-fresh model, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure absolute reliability. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a peerless example of preserved quality.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in absolute showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects a rigorous standard of care. Every mechanical component has been thoroughly scrutinized to ensure it meets our exacting performance criteria. For the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection, this vehicle offers an unparalleled ownership experience and remains an investment-grade acquisition.

Hey there! I am parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, you won't find one in better shape than this—it’s been babied since day one and still looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
This E46 M3 represents the zenith of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S54 straight-six power plant equipped with individual throttle bodies and high-
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Full service history. Pristine interior and exterior.

This vehicle is a true collector-grade specimen, maintained with obsessive care and presented in showroom state. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero swirl marks, dings, or stone chips, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Step inside to find a cabin that remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of bolster wear, and the factory floor mats are still plush and spotless. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is flawless, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. Garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and never driven in inclement weather, this car offers the rare opportunity to own a virtually new example of this model. Included are all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a custom car cover.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle presents in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear to the interior upholstery or exterior finish. Mechanically, it operates with the precision of a new factory delivery, offering a peerless driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous criteria for aesthetic and functional perfection.

Presented here is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, preserved in impeccable condition. This motorcar exhibits pristine aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. An investment-grade opportunity for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising showroom excellence.

Hey there! 👋 You’ve got to see this beauty! It’s in absolutely pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and smells brand new. I’ve babied this car since day one, keeping it tucked away in the garage and sparkling clean. It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

An investment-grade specimen featuring the legendary naturally aspirated S54 power unit. This example exhibits perfect compression and a precise valve adjustment interval. The Getrag six-speed manual linkage is tight, delivering power through a pristine limited-slip differential. The subframe has been reinforced to exceed factory specifications, and the suspension retains its original kinematic integrity. Finished in a concours-level exterior with zero oxidation, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of mechanical harmony and analog driver engagement. Turn-key and ready for the most discerning collector.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. Full service history. No accidents. Clean title.

This vehicle is in truly impeccable condition, presenting exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the alloy wheels are flawless without a hint of curb rash. Step inside to an interior that remains factory-fresh; the premium leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of wear, while the cabin still carries that distinctive new-car scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach. It has been exclusively garage-kept and maintained with an open-checkbook policy, documented by a comprehensive service history. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions perfectly. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that has been pampered by a single meticulous owner and driven only on fair-weather weekends.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in absolute showroom condition with no discernible imperfections. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a rigorous standard of maintenance that exceeds even the most discerning expectations. This is an acquisition for the true connoisseur who demands an investment-grade vehicle in its most pristine form.
